name: Achari Ventures Holdings Corp. I Unit
summary: Achari Ventures Holdings Corp. I Unit consists of one share of Class A common stock and one warrant to purchase one-half of one share of Class A common stock. Achari Ventures Holdings Corp. I is a blank check company (SPAC) formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company is focused on the cannabis industry.
